mapper.select: select w.id, w.title, m.nickname as artist_name, m.nickname as artist_nickname, m.id as artist_id, case w.category when 'DIGITAL_ART' then '디지털 아트' when 'MOTION' then '모션그래픽' when '3D_ANIMATION' then '3D 애니메이션' when 'CINEMATIC' then '시네마틱' when 'EXPERIMENTAL' then '실험' when 'LOOP' then '루프' when 'AI_GENERATED' then 'AI 생성' else w.category end as category, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_auction a where a.work_id = w.id ) then '경매' else '거래' end as sale_type, w.status, w.created_datetime as created_at, w.view_count, w.like_count, w.price, coalesce(w.thumbnail, wf.file_url) as thumbnail_url, vf.file_url as video_url, coalesce(vf.file_type, wf.file_type) as file_type, coalesce(vf.width, wf.width) as file_width, coalesce(vf.height, wf.height) as file_height, coalesce(vf.file_size, wf.file_size) as file_size, case when coalesce(vf.width, wf.width) is not null and coalesce(vf.height, wf.height) is not null then coalesce(vf.width, wf.width) || ' x ' || coalesce(vf.height, wf.height) else null end as resolution, a.status as auction_status, a.current_price as current_price, a.bid_count, ( select count(*) from tbl_report r where r.target_type = 'WORK' and r.target_id = w.id ) as report_count, ( select max(r2.created_datetime) from tbl_report r2 where r2.target_type = 'WORK' and r2.target_id = w.id ) as last_report_date from tbl_work w join tbl_member m on w.member_id = m.id left join lateral ( select * from tbl_work_file wf2 where wf2.work_id = w.id and wf2.file_type = 'THUMBNAIL' order by wf2.sort_order, wf2.id limit 1 ) wf on true left join lateral ( select * from tbl_work_file vf2 where vf2.work_id = w.id and vf2.file_type = 'VIDEO' order by vf2.sort_order, vf2.id limit 1 ) vf on true left join lateral ( select * from tbl_auction a2 where a2.work_id = w.id order by a2.id desc limit 1 ) a on true where w.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_work set status = #{status}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select count(*) from tbl_work w join tbl_member m on w.member_id = m.id
w.deleted_datetime is null
and ( w.title ilike '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or m.nickname ilike '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
and w.status = #{status}
